name: Scene Type Classification
description: Broad categorization of broadcast scene types

category_descriptions.LIVE_ACTION: Active play — ball in motion, players running
category_descriptions.SET_PIECE: Dead ball: free kick, corner, throw-in, penalty
category_descriptions.TACTICAL_VIEW: Wide overhead showing team shape and formations
category_descriptions.PLAYER_CLOSEUP: Tight shot of player face, reaction, or moment
category_descriptions.BENCH_CLOSEUP: Coach, bench staff, or substitutes on sideline
category_descriptions.REFEREE: Referee or assistant referee in focus
category_descriptions.REPLAY: Slow-motion or instant replay of a previous moment
category_descriptions.GRAPHICS: Scoreboard, statistics overlay, pre-match lineups graphic

prompt:
Classify this football broadcast frame's scene type.

Categories: LIVE_ACTION, SET_PIECE, CELEBRATION, TACTICAL_VIEW, PLAYER_CLOSEUP, BENCH_CLOSEUP, REFEREE, CROWD, REPLAY, GRAPHICS, PRE_POST_MATCH

Respond with JSON only:
{"scene": "LIVE_ACTION", "confidence": 0.9, "reasoning": "ball in play, multiple players in motion"}

balanced.name: Balanced Coverage
balanced.description: Representative sample of all scene types
